title: Apps vs. Websites
drDigitalIntro: What's the difference between an app and a website? A website opens in your browser — you type a web address and it loads. An app is a separate program you download and install — it gets its own icon. Most apps have a matching website. Apps can often work offline, send you notifications, and access your camera or location. Websites work anywhere with a browser. You'll use both!
drDigitalSuccess: Apps live on your device, websites live in your browser. Both are useful!
drDigitalHint: Just read along and click Continue.
